message:
fix: 2 correctness bugs — flipped filter op names (ne/le/ge), window frame CURRENT ROW as start bound

- compiler: flipOp returned AST names (ne/le/ge) instead of FilterOp names (neq/lte/gte),
  causing value-on-left comparisons like `5 != col` to silently pass all rows
- operators: window frame CURRENT ROW as start bound cast to NaN, skipping all rows
- types: WindowSpec.frame.start now includes "current" in union type
- compiler: removed unsafe type casts on frame bounds
